    exact A

```lean
import Mathlib.Algebra.DirectSum.Module
import PersistentDecomp.Mathlib.Order.Disjoint
import PersistentDecomp.Prereqs.Indecomposable
import PersistentDecomp.Prereqs.PersistenceSubmodule

/-!

# Direct sum decompositions for persistence modules (dual order version)

In this file, we define the type of direct sum decompositions of a persistence module `M`.
This has a natural order given by refinements.

Relation to the material in `PersistentDecomp.DirectSumDecompositionDual.lean`:
here, we are considering the *dual order* of the one constructed in the other file.

-/

open CategoryTheory CategoryTheory.Limits DirectSum

namespace Dual

variable {C : Type} [Category.{0, 0} C] {K : Type} [DivisionRing K] {M : C ÔąĄ ModuleCat K}

variable (M) in
/-- A direct sum decomposition of `M ` is a set of non-zero submodules
that are linearly independent and whose supremum is the whole of `M`. -/
@[ext]
structure DirectSumDecomposition where

  sSupIndep' : sSupIndep carrier
  sSup_eq_top' : sSup carrier = ÔŐĄ
  not_bot_mem' : ÔŐą Ôłë carrier

namespace DirectSumDecomposition

instance : SetLike (DirectSumDecomposition M) (PersistenceSubmodule M) where
  coe := carrier
  coe_injective' DÔéü DÔéé := by cases DÔéü; congr!

attribute [-instance] SetLike.instPartialOrder

protected lemma sSupIndep (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) : sSupIndep (SetLike.coe D) := D.sSupIndep'

lemma sSup_eq_top (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) : sSup (SetLike.coe D) = ÔŐĄ := D.sSup_eq_top'
lemma not_bot_mem (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) : ÔŐą Ôłë D := D.not_bot_mem'

lemma pointwise_iSup_eq_top (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) (x : C) : ÔĘć p Ôłł D, p x = ÔŐĄ := sorry

lemma pointwise_sSup_eq_top (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) (x : C) : ÔĘć p Ôłł D, p x = ÔŐĄ := sorry

open scoped Classical in
lemma isInternal (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (c : C) :
    IsInternal (M := M.obj c) (S := Submodule K (M.obj c)) fun p : I ÔćŽ p.val c := by
  rw [DirectSum.isInternal_submodule_iff_iSupIndep_and_iSup_eq_top]

every submodule `N` that appears in `D`, there is a subset `B` of submodules that appear
in `DÔéü` such that `ÔłĹ T Ôłł B, T = N`. -/
def IsRefinement (DÔéü DÔéé : DirectSumDecomposition M) : Prop :=
  ÔłÇ ÔŽâNÔŽä, N Ôłł DÔéé Ôćĺ Ôłâ B : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M), B ÔŐć DÔéü Ôłž N = sSup B

    rcases h_le_subset ÔčĘA, h_A_memÔčę with ÔčĘC, h_CÔčę
    simp only at h_C
    exact le_trans h_C.right (sSup_le_sSup h_C.left)
  have h_aux' : NÔéÇ.val Ôłë B := by
    intro h_contra
    simp only [exists_and_right, Subtype.exists, exists_prop, Set.mem_setOf_eq, SetLike.coe_mem,
      and_true, B] at h_contra
    rcases h_contra with ÔčĘA, hÔéü, hÔééÔčę
    exact (h_not_le (ÔčĘA, hÔéüÔčę) hÔéé)
  have h_disj : Disjoint NÔéÇ.val (sSup B) := by
    exact (sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup J.sSupIndep' NÔéÇ.prop h_sub h_aux')
  have h_not_bot : NÔéÇ.val Ôëá ÔŐą := by
    intro h_contra

  have h_gt : sSup I < NÔéÇ.val ÔŐö sSup I := by

    apply lt_of_lt_of_le h_gt h_ge

/-- Suppose that `I, J` are direct sum decompositions of `M`, `N` is a submodule appearing in `J`
and `A, B` are submodules appearing in `I` such that `N ÔëĄ A, B`. Then `A = B`. -/
lemma UniqueGE (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
  (N : J) (A : I) (B : I) : N.val ÔëĄ A Ôłž N.val ÔëĄ B Ôćĺ A = B := by
  by_contra h'
  push_neg at h'
  rcases h' with ÔčĘh_le, h_neqÔčę
  have h_neq' : A.val Ôëá B.val := by
    simp [h_neq]
  have h_disj : Disjoint A.val B.val := by
    let s : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M) := {A.val, B.val}
    have h_sub : s ÔëĄ I.carrier := by
      intro X hx
      rcases hx with ÔčĘh_memÔčę
      ┬Ě exact (h_mem ÔľŞ A.prop)
      subst X
      exact B.prop
    exact (sSupIndep_pair h_neq').mp (sSupIndep.mono I.sSupIndep' h_sub)
  have h_le' : N.val ÔëĄ A.val ÔŐô B.val := le_inf h_le.1 h_le.2
  have h_eq_bot : N ÔëĄ (ÔŐą : PersistenceSubmodule M) := h_le'.trans <| disjoint_iff_inf_le.mp h_disj
  simp only [le_bot_iff] at h_eq_bot
  exact (J.not_bot_mem' (h_eq_bot ÔľŞ N.prop))

/-- Let `I, J` be direct sum decompositions of `M` with `J` a refinement of `I`.
Then `RefinementMap` is the function that sends a submodule `N` appearing in `J` to the unique submodule
in `I` that contains `N`. -/
noncomputable def RefinementMap (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
  (h : IsRefinement J I) : J Ôćĺ I :=
  open scoped Classical in
  if h' : I = J then by
    intro N
    use N
    exact (h' ÔľŞ N.prop)
  else by
    intro N
    choose A h using (RefinementMapSurj' I J h N)
    exact A

@[simp]
lemma RefinementMapId (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (h : IsRefinement I I) (N : I) :
  (RefinementMap I I h) N = N := by
  simp [RefinementMap]

/-- `RefinementMap N` sends `N` to something it is included in. -/
lemma RefinementMapLE (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
  (h : IsRefinement J I) : ÔłÇ N : J, N.val ÔëĄ (RefinementMap I J h N).val := by
  classical
  obtain rfl | hIJ := eq_or_ne I J
  ┬Ě simp [RefinementMapId]
  ┬Ě intro N
    simpa [RefinementMap, hIJ] using Exists.choose_spec (RefinementMapSurj' I J h N)

/-- Two modules that both decompose the same element are sent to the same submodule by the
`RefinementMap`. -/
lemma RefinementMapSameImage (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
    (h : IsRefinement J I) (NÔéü NÔéé : J) (h_leÔéü : NÔéé.val ÔëĄ RefinementMap I J h NÔéü) :
    RefinementMap I J h NÔéé = RefinementMap I J h NÔéü := by
  have h_leÔéé : NÔéé.val ÔëĄ (RefinementMap I J h NÔéé) := RefinementMapLE I J h NÔéé
  exact (UniqueGE I J NÔéé (RefinementMap I J h NÔéü) (RefinementMap I J h NÔéé) (ÔčĘh_leÔéü, h_leÔééÔčę)).symm

/-- If `N ÔëĄ A` for some `A : I`, then `RefinementMap N = A`. -/
lemma SendsToUniqueGE (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
    (h : IsRefinement J I) (N : J) (A : I) : N.val ÔëĄ A Ôćĺ (RefinementMap I J h N) = A := by
  intro h_le
  let B : I := (RefinementMap I J h N)
  rw [UniqueGE I J N A B (ÔčĘh_le, RefinementMapLE I J h NÔčę)]

lemma RefinmentMapFunctorial (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
    (K : DirectSumDecomposition M) (hij : IsRefinement J I) (hjk : IsRefinement K J)
    (hik : IsRefinement K I) (N : K) :
    RefinementMap I K hik N = RefinementMap I J hij (RefinementMap J K hjk N) := by
  have h_le : N.val ÔëĄ RefinementMap I J hij (RefinementMap J K hjk N) := by
    apply le_trans (RefinementMapLE J K hjk N)
    exact (RefinementMapLE I J hij _)
  exact SendsToUniqueGE I K hik N (RefinementMap I J hij (RefinementMap J K hjk N)) h_le
```

```lean
import Mathlib.Algebra.DirectSum.Module
import PersistentDecomp.Mathlib.Order.Disjoint
import PersistentDecomp.Prereqs.Indecomposable
import PersistentDecomp.Prereqs.PersistenceSubmodule

/-!

# Direct sum decompositions for persistence modules (dual order version)

In this file, we define the type of direct sum decompositions of a persistence module `M`.
This has a natural order given by refinements.

Relation to the material in `PersistentDecomp.DirectSumDecompositionDual.lean`:
here, we are considering the *dual order* of the one constructed in the other file.

-/

open CategoryTheory CategoryTheory.Limits DirectSum
open CompleteLattice hiding sSup_le -- TODO: Fix in mathlib

namespace Dual

variable {C : Type} [Category.{0, 0} C] {K : Type} [DivisionRing K] {M : C ÔąĄ ModuleCat K}

variable (M) in
/-- A direct sum decomposition of `M ` is a set of non-zero submodules
that are linearly independent and whose supremum is the whole of `M`. -/
@[ext]
structure DirectSumDecomposition where
  carrier : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)
  sSupIndep' : sSupIndep carrier
  sSup_eq_top' : sSup carrier = ÔŐĄ
  not_bot_mem' : ÔŐą Ôłë carrier

namespace DirectSumDecomposition

instance : SetLike (DirectSumDecomposition M) (PersistenceSubmodule M) where
  coe := carrier
  coe_injective' DÔéü DÔéé := by cases DÔéü; congr!

attribute [-instance] SetLike.instPartialOrder

protected lemma sSupIndep (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) : sSupIndep (SetLike.coe D) := D.sSupIndep'

lemma sSup_eq_top (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) : sSup (SetLike.coe D) = ÔŐĄ := D.sSup_eq_top'
lemma not_bot_mem (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) : ÔŐą Ôłë D := D.not_bot_mem'

lemma pointwise_iSup_eq_top (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) (x : C) : ÔĘć p Ôłł D, p x = ÔŐĄ := sorry

lemma pointwise_sSup_eq_top (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) (x : C) : ÔĘć p Ôłł D, p x = ÔŐĄ := sorry

open scoped Classical in
lemma isInternal (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (c : C) :
    IsInternal (M := M.obj c) (S := Submodule K (M.obj c)) fun p : I ÔćŽ p.val c := by
  rw [DirectSum.isInternal_submodule_iff_iSupIndep_and_iSup_eq_top]
  constructor
  ┬Ě sorry
  sorry
  --rw [ÔćÉ iSup_apply, ÔćÉ sSup_eq_iSup', I.sSup_eq_top]
  --rfl

variable {M : C ÔąĄ ModuleCat K} in
/-- Let `DÔéü, DÔéé` be direct sum decompositions of `M` we say that `DÔéü` is a refinement of `DÔéé` if for
every submodule `N` that appears in `DÔéé`, there is a subset `B` of submodules that appear
in `DÔéü` such that `ÔłĹ T Ôłł B, T = N`. -/
```

```lean
import Mathlib.Algebra.DirectSum.Module
import PersistentDecomp.Mathlib.Order.Disjoint
import PersistentDecomp.Prereqs.Indecomposable
import PersistentDecomp.Prereqs.PersistenceSubmodule

/-!

# Direct sum decompositions for persistence modules (dual order version)

In this file, we define the type of direct sum decompositions of a persistence module `M`.
This has a natural order given by refinements.

Relation to the material in `PersistentDecomp.DirectSumDecompositionDual.lean`:
here, we are considering the *dual order* of the one constructed in the other file.

-/

open CategoryTheory CategoryTheory.Limits DirectSum
open CompleteLattice hiding sSup_le -- TODO: Fix in mathlib

namespace Dual

variable {C : Type} [Category.{0, 0} C] {K : Type} [DivisionRing K] {M : C ÔąĄ ModuleCat K}

variable (M) in
/-- A direct sum decomposition of `M ` is a set of non-zero submodules
that are linearly independent and whose supremum is the whole of `M`. -/
@[ext]
structure DirectSumDecomposition where
  carrier : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)
  sSupIndep' : sSupIndep carrier
  sSup_eq_top' : sSup carrier = ÔŐĄ
  not_bot_mem' : ÔŐą Ôłë carrier

namespace DirectSumDecomposition

instance : SetLike (DirectSumDecomposition M) (PersistenceSubmodule M) where
  coe := carrier
  coe_injective' DÔéü DÔéé := by cases DÔéü; congr!

attribute [-instance] SetLike.instPartialOrder

protected lemma sSupIndep (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) : sSupIndep (SetLike.coe D) := D.sSupIndep'

lemma sSup_eq_top (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) : sSup (SetLike.coe D) = ÔŐĄ := D.sSup_eq_top'
lemma not_bot_mem (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) : ÔŐą Ôłë D := D.not_bot_mem'

lemma pointwise_iSup_eq_top (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) (x : C) : ÔĘć p Ôłł D, p x = ÔŐĄ := sorry

lemma pointwise_sSup_eq_top (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) (x : C) : ÔĘć p Ôłł D, p x = ÔŐĄ := sorry

open scoped Classical in
lemma isInternal (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (c : C) :
    IsInternal (M := M.obj c) (S := Submodule K (M.obj c)) fun p : I ÔćŽ p.val c := by
  rw [DirectSum.isInternal_submodule_iff_iSupIndep_and_iSup_eq_top]
  constructor
  ┬Ě sorry
  sorry
  --rw [ÔćÉ iSup_apply, ÔćÉ sSup_eq_iSup', I.sSup_eq_top]
  --rfl

variable {M : C ÔąĄ ModuleCat K} in
/-- Let `DÔéü, DÔéé` be direct sum decomposition of `M` we say that `DÔéü` is a refinement of `DÔéé` if for
every submodule `N` that appears in `D`, there is a subset `B` of submodules that appear
in `DÔéü` such that `ÔłĹ T Ôłł B, T = N`. -/
def IsRefinement (DÔéü DÔéé : DirectSumDecomposition M) : Prop :=
  ÔłÇ ÔŽâNÔŽä, N Ôłł DÔéé Ôćĺ Ôłâ B : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M), B ÔŐć DÔéü Ôłž N = sSup B

variable {M : C ÔąĄ ModuleCat K} in
/-- Suppose `I, J` are direct sum decompositions of `M ` and `J` is a refinement of `I`.
Then for any submodule `N` appearing in `J`, there is a submodule  `A` appearing in `I`
such that `N ÔëĄ A`. -/
lemma RefinementMapSurj' (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
  (h : IsRefinement J I) : ÔłÇ N : J, Ôłâ A : I, N.val ÔëĄ A.val := by
  by_contra! h_contra
  rcases h_contra with ÔčĘNÔéÇ, h_not_leÔčę
  have h_ge : NÔéÇ.val ÔŐö sSup I ÔëĄ sSup J := by
    rw [ÔćÉ sSup_pair]
    apply sSup_le_iff.mpr
    intro b h_mem
    rcases h_mem with ÔčĘh_nÔčę
    ┬Ě exact (le_sSup (h_n ÔľŞ NÔéÇ.prop))
    ┬Ě rename b Ôłł {sSup (SetLike.coe I)} => h_i
      have h' : sSup (SetLike.coe I) ÔëĄ sSup J := by
        rw [I.sSup_eq_top, J.sSup_eq_top]
      simp only [Set.mem_singleton_iff] at h_i
      exact (h_i ÔľŞ h')
  let B : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M) := {C | Ôłâ A : I, C ÔëĄ A.val Ôłž C Ôłł J}
  have h_sub : B ÔŐć J := by
    intro C h_C_mem
    simp only [exists_and_right, Subtype.exists, exists_prop, Set.mem_setOf_eq, B] at h_C_mem
    rcases h_C_mem with ÔčĘhÔéü, _Ôčę
    exact hÔéü.right
  have h_aux : sSup B = sSup I := by
    simp_rw [le_antisymm_iff, sSup_le_iff]
    constructor
    ┬Ě intro b h_mem
      simp only [exists_and_right, Subtype.exists, exists_prop, Set.mem_setOf_eq, B] at h_mem
      rcases h_mem with ÔčĘhÔéü, _Ôčę
      rcases hÔéü with ÔčĘa, h_a, h_leÔčę
      exact le_sSup_of_le h_a h_le
    have h_le_subset : ÔłÇ A : I, Ôłâ C ÔŐć B, A ÔëĄ sSup C := by
      intro A
      choose f hf hf' using h
      refine ÔčĘf A.prop, ?_, by rw [ÔćÉ hf' A.prop]Ôčę
      intro ╬▒ h_╬▒
      simp only [exists_and_right, Subtype.exists, exists_prop, Set.mem_setOf_eq, B]
      refine ÔčĘÔčĘA, A.prop, ?_Ôčę, hf A.prop h_╬▒Ôčę
      rw [hf' A.prop]
      exact le_sSup h_╬▒
    intro A h_A_mem
    rcases h_le_subset ÔčĘA, h_A_memÔčę with ÔčĘC, h_CÔčę
    simp only at h_C
    exact le_trans h_C.right (sSup_le_sSup h_C.left)
  have h_aux' : NÔéÇ.val Ôłë B := by
    intro h_contra
    simp only [exists_and_right, Subtype.exists, exists_prop, Set.mem_setOf_eq, SetLike.coe_mem,
      and_true, B] at h_contra
    rcases h_contra with ÔčĘA, hÔéü, hÔééÔčę
    exact (h_not_le (ÔčĘA, hÔéüÔčę) hÔéé)
  have h_disj : Disjoint NÔéÇ.val (sSup B) := by
    exact (sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup J.sSupIndep' NÔéÇ.prop h_sub h_aux')
  have h_not_bot : NÔéÇ.val Ôëá ÔŐą := by
    intro h_contra
    exact J.not_bot_mem (h_contra ÔľŞ NÔéÇ.prop)
  have h_gt : sSup I < NÔéÇ.val ÔŐö sSup I := by
    rw [ÔćÉ h_aux]
    -- No clue why I couldn't use this theorem from mathlib directly and had to copy paste it here
    -- instead assuming it has to do with needing to bump
    exact (right_lt_sup_of_left_ne_bot h_disj h_not_bot)
  have contra : (ÔŐĄ : PersistenceSubmodule M) < ÔŐĄ := by
    rw [I.sSup_eq_top, J.sSup_eq_top] at *
    apply lt_of_lt_of_le h_gt h_ge
  exact (lt_self_iff_false (ÔŐĄ : PersistenceSubmodule M)).mp contra

/-- Suppose that `I, J` are direct sum decompositions of `M`, `N` is a submodule appearing in `J`
and `A, B` are submodules appearing in `I` such that `N ÔëĄ A, B`. Then `A = B`. -/
lemma UniqueGE (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
  (N : J) (A : I) (B : I) : N.val ÔëĄ A Ôłž N.val ÔëĄ B Ôćĺ A = B := by
  by_contra h'
  push_neg at h'
  rcases h' with ÔčĘh_le, h_neqÔčę
  have h_neq' : A.val Ôëá B.val := by
    simp [h_neq]
  have h_disj : Disjoint A.val B.val := by
    let s : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M) := {A.val, B.val}
    have h_sub : s ÔëĄ I.carrier := by
      intro X hx
      rcases hx with ÔčĘh_memÔčę
      ┬Ě exact (h_mem ÔľŞ A.prop)
      subst X
      exact B.prop
    exact (sSupIndep_pair h_neq').mp (sSupIndep.mono I.sSupIndep' h_sub)
  have h_le' : N.val ÔëĄ A.val ÔŐô B.val := le_inf h_le.1 h_le.2
  have h_eq_bot : N ÔëĄ (ÔŐą : PersistenceSubmodule M) := h_le'.trans <| disjoint_iff_inf_le.mp h_disj
  simp only [le_bot_iff] at h_eq_bot
  exact (J.not_bot_mem' (h_eq_bot ÔľŞ N.prop))

/-- Let `I, J` be direct sum decompositions of `M` with `J` a refinement of `I`.
Then for any submodule `N` appearing in `J`, there is a unique submodule  `A` appearing in `I`
such that `N ÔëĄ A`. -/
noncomputable def RefinementMap (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
  (h : IsRefinement J I) : J Ôćĺ I :=
  open scoped Classical in
  if h' : I = J then by
    intro N
    use N
    exact (h' ÔľŞ N.prop)
  else by
    intro N
    choose A h using (RefinementMapSurj' I J h N)
    exact A

@[simp]
lemma RefinementMapId (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (h : IsRefinement I I) (N : I) :
  (RefinementMap I I h) N = N := by
  simp [RefinementMap]

/-- `RefinementMap N` sends `N` to something it is included in. -/
lemma RefinementMapLE (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
  (h : IsRefinement J I) : ÔłÇ N : J, N.val ÔëĄ (RefinementMap I J h N).val := by
  classical
  obtain rfl | hIJ := eq_or_ne I J
  ┬Ě simp [RefinementMapId]
  ┬Ě intro N
    simpa [RefinementMap, hIJ] using Exists.choose_spec (RefinementMapSurj' I J h N)

/-- Two modules that both decompose the same element are sent to the same submodule by the
`RefinementMap`. -/
lemma RefinementMapSameImage (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
    (h : IsRefinement J I) (NÔéü NÔéé : J) (h_leÔéü : NÔéé.val ÔëĄ RefinementMap I J h NÔéü) :
    RefinementMap I J h NÔéé = RefinementMap I J h NÔéü := by
  have h_leÔéé : NÔéé.val ÔëĄ (RefinementMap I J h NÔéé) := RefinementMapLE I J h NÔéé
  exact (UniqueGE I J NÔéé (RefinementMap I J h NÔéü) (RefinementMap I J h NÔéé) (ÔčĘh_leÔéü, h_leÔééÔčę)).symm
```

```lean
/-- Suppose that `I, J` are direct sum decompositions of `M`, `N` is a submodule appearing in `J`
and `A, B` are submodules appearing in `I` such that `N ÔëĄ A, B`. Then `A = B`. -/
lemma UniqueGE (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
  (N : J) (A : I) (B : I) : N.val ÔëĄ A Ôłž N.val ÔëĄ B Ôćĺ A = B := by
  by_contra h'
  push_neg at h'
  rcases h' with ÔčĘh_le, h_neqÔčę
  have h_neq' : A.val Ôëá B.val := by
    simp [h_neq]
  have h_disj : Disjoint A.val B.val := by
    let s : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M) := {A.val, B.val}
    have h_sub : s ÔëĄ I.carrier := by
      intro X hx
      rcases hx with ÔčĘh_memÔčę
      ┬Ě exact (h_mem ÔľŞ A.prop)
      subst X
      exact B.prop
    exact (sSupIndep_pair h_neq').mp (sSupIndep.mono I.sSupIndep' h_sub)
  have h_le' : N.val ÔëĄ A.val ÔŐô B.val := le_inf h_le.1 h_le.2
  have h_eq_bot : N ÔëĄ (ÔŐą : PersistenceSubmodule M) := h_le'.trans <| disjoint_iff_inf_le.mp h_disj
  simp only [le_bot_iff] at h_eq_bot
  exact (J.not_bot_mem' (h_eq_bot ÔľŞ N.prop))

/-- Let `I, J` be direct sum decompositions of `M` with `J` a refinement of `I`.
Then `RefinementMap` is the function that sends a submodule `N` appearing in `J` to the unique submodule
in `I` that contains `N`. -/
noncomputable def RefinementMap (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
  (h : IsRefinement J I) : J Ôćĺ I :=
  open scoped Classical in
  if h' : I = J then by
    intro N
    use N
    exact (h' ÔľŞ N.prop)
  else by
    intro N
    choose A h using (RefinementMapSurj' I J h N)
    exact A

@[simp]
lemma RefinementMapId (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (h : IsRefinement I I) (N : I) :
  (RefinementMap I I h) N = N := by
  simp [RefinementMap]

    constructor

    ┬Ě intro hN_J
```

```lean
    rcases h_contra with ÔčĘA, hÔéü, hÔééÔčę
    exact (h_not_le (ÔčĘA, hÔéüÔčę) hÔéé)
  have h_disj : Disjoint NÔéÇ.val (sSup B) := by
    exact (sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup J.sSupIndep' NÔéÇ.prop h_sub h_aux')
  have h_not_bot : NÔéÇ.val Ôëá ÔŐą := by
    intro h_contra
    exact J.not_bot_mem (h_contra ÔľŞ NÔéÇ.prop)
  have h_gt : sSup I < NÔéÇ.val ÔŐö sSup I := by
    rw [ÔćÉ h_aux]
    -- No clue why I couldn't use this theorem from mathlib directly and had to copy paste it here
    -- instead assuming it has to do with needing to bump
    exact (right_lt_sup_of_left_ne_bot h_disj h_not_bot)
  have contra : (ÔŐĄ : PersistenceSubmodule M) < ÔŐĄ := by
    rw [I.sSup_eq_top, J.sSup_eq_top] at *
    apply lt_of_lt_of_le h_gt h_ge
  exact (lt_self_iff_false (ÔŐĄ : PersistenceSubmodule M)).mp contra

/-- Suppose that `I, J` are direct sum decompositions of `M`, `N` is a submodule appearing in `J`
and `A, B` are submodules appearing in `I` such that `N ÔëĄ A, B`. Then `A = B`. -/
lemma UniqueGE (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
  (N : J) (A : I) (B : I) : N.val ÔëĄ A Ôłž N.val ÔëĄ B Ôćĺ A = B := by
  by_contra h'
  push_neg at h'
  rcases h' with ÔčĘh_le, h_neqÔčę
  have h_neq' : A.val Ôëá B.val := by
    simp [h_neq]
  have h_disj : Disjoint A.val B.val := by
    let s : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M) := {A.val, B.val}
    have h_sub : s ÔëĄ I.carrier := by
      intro X hx
      rcases hx with ÔčĘh_memÔčę
      ┬Ě exact (h_mem ÔľŞ A.prop)
      subst X
      exact B.prop
    exact (sSupIndep_pair h_neq').mp (sSupIndep.mono I.sSupIndep' h_sub)
  have h_le' : N.val ÔëĄ A.val ÔŐô B.val := le_inf h_le.1 h_le.2
  have h_eq_bot : N ÔëĄ (ÔŐą : PersistenceSubmodule M) := h_le'.trans <| disjoint_iff_inf_le.mp h_disj
  simp only [le_bot_iff] at h_eq_bot
  exact (J.not_bot_mem' (h_eq_bot ÔľŞ N.prop))

/-- Let `I, J` be direct sum decompositions of `M` with `J` a refinement of `I`.
Then `RefinementMap` is the function that sends a submodule `N` appearing in `J` to the unique submodule
in `I` that contains `N`. -/
noncomputable def RefinementMap (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
  (h : IsRefinement J I) : J Ôćĺ I :=
  open scoped Classical in
  if h' : I = J then by
    intro N
    use N
    exact (h' ÔľŞ N.prop)
  else by
    intro N
    choose A h using (RefinementMapSurj' I J h N)
    exact A

@[simp]
lemma RefinementMapId (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (h : IsRefinement I I) (N : I) :
  (RefinementMap I I h) N = N := by
  simp [RefinementMap]

/-- `RefinementMap N` sends `N` to something it is included in. -/
lemma RefinementMapLE (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
  (h : IsRefinement J I) : ÔłÇ N : J, N.val ÔëĄ (RefinementMap I J h N).val := by
  classical
  obtain rfl | hIJ := eq_or_ne I J
  ┬Ě simp [RefinementMapId]
  ┬Ě intro N
    simpa [RefinementMap, hIJ] using Exists.choose_spec (RefinementMapSurj' I J h N)

/-- Two modules that both decompose the same element are sent to the same submodule by the
`RefinementMap`. -/
lemma RefinementMapSameImage (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
    (h : IsRefinement J I) (NÔéü NÔéé : J) (h_leÔéü : NÔéé.val ÔëĄ RefinementMap I J h NÔéü) :
    RefinementMap I J h NÔéé = RefinementMap I J h NÔéü := by
  have h_leÔéé : NÔéé.val ÔëĄ (RefinementMap I J h NÔéé) := RefinementMapLE I J h NÔéé
  exact (UniqueGE I J NÔéé (RefinementMap I J h NÔéü) (RefinementMap I J h NÔéé) (ÔčĘh_leÔéü, h_leÔééÔčę)).symm

/-- If `N ÔëĄ A` for some `A : I`, then `RefinementMap N = A`. -/
lemma SendsToUniqueGE (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
    (h : IsRefinement J I) (N : J) (A : I) : N.val ÔëĄ A Ôćĺ (RefinementMap I J h N) = A
```

```lean
/-!

# Direct sum decompositions for persistence modules (dual order version)

In this file, we define the type of direct sum decompositions of a persistence module `M`.
This has a natural order given by refinements.

Relation to the material in `PersistentDecomp.DirectSumDecompositionDual.lean`:
here, we are considering the *dual order* of the one constructed in the other file.

/-- A direct sum decomposition of `M ` is a set of non-zero submodules
that are linearly independent and whose supremum is the whole of `M`. -/
```

The key insight is that `IsRefinement J I` means that every element in `I` can be written as the supremum of some subset of `J`. So, for any `N Ôłł I`, we have `N = sSup B` for some `B ÔŐć J`. Since `sSup B` is an element of `J` (because `B` is a subset of `J` and `sSup` preserves membership in the lattice of submodules), we have `N Ôłł J`.

The proof structure is:
1. Assume `I ÔëĄ J` (meaning `IsRefinement I J`) and `J ÔëĄ I` (meaning `IsRefinement J I`).
2. We already proved `h_final_left : ÔłÇ N Ôłł J, N Ôłł I`.
3. We need to prove `ÔłÇ N Ôłł I, N Ôłł J`.
4. Let `N Ôłł I`. We use the fact `IsRefinement J I` to show `N Ôłł J`.
5. `IsRefinement J I` means `ÔłÇ N' Ôłł I, Ôłâ B, B ÔŐć J Ôłž N' = sSup B`.
6. Applying this to our `N`, we get `Ôłâ B, B ÔŐć J Ôłž N = sSup B`.
7. Let `B` be such a set. Let `N' = sSup B`.
8. Since `N = N'`, we have `N = sSup B`.
9. Since `B ÔŐć J`, we know that `sSup B Ôłł J` (because `sSup` preserves membership in the lattice of submodules, and `sSup B` is the least element in `J` that contains all elements of `B`).
10. Therefore, `N Ôłł J`.

This completes the proof of `ÔłÇ N Ôłł I, N Ôłł J`, which combined with `h_final_left` proves `I = J`, completing the proof of `le_antisymm`.

```lean
      have h_A : Ôłâ A : I, N ÔëĄ A.val := by
        exact (RefinementMapSurj' I J h_I_le_J) N'
      rcases h_A with ÔčĘA, h_N_le_AÔčę
      choose f hf hf' using h_J_le_I
      let h_BÔéü := hf' N'.prop
      let h_BÔéé := hf N'.prop
      simp only at h_BÔéü
      have h_mem : A.val Ôłł f N'.prop := by
        by_contra h_A_not_mem
        have h_aux : Disjoint A.val (sSup (f N'.prop)) := by
          exact (I.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup A.prop h_BÔéé h_A_not_mem)
        have h_aux' : sSup (f N'.prop) ÔëĄ A.val := h_BÔéü ÔľŞ h_N_le_A
        have h_last : sSup (f N'.prop) = (ÔŐą : PersistenceSubmodule M) := by
          rw [disjoint_comm] at h_aux
          exact (Disjoint.eq_bot_of_le h_aux h_aux')
        rw [ÔćÉ h_BÔéü] at h_last
        subst h_last
        exact (J.not_bot_mem h_N_in_J)
      have h_A_le_N : A.val ÔëĄ N := by
        simpa [ÔćÉ h_BÔéü] using le_sSup h_mem
      have h_A_eq_N : A.val = N := by
        exact (le_antisymm h_A_le_N h_N_le_A)
      have h_contra : N Ôłł I := by
        exact h_A_eq_N ÔľŞ A.prop
      aesop
    have h_final_right : ÔłÇ N Ôłł I, N Ôłł J := by
      sorry
```

The proof state is:
- `I` and `J` are `DirectSumDecomposition M`
- `h_J_le_I : I ÔëĄ J` (meaning `I` refines `J`)
- `h_I_le_J : J ÔëĄ I` (meaning `J` refines `I`)
- `h_final_left : ÔłÇ N Ôłł J, N Ôłł I` (meaning `J ÔŐć I`)
- Goal: `ÔłÇ N Ôłł I, N Ôłł J` (meaning `I ÔŐć J`)

We need to prove that `I ÔŐć J`.

Let's think. We have:
- `h_I_le_J : J ÔëĄ I` means that for every `N Ôłł I`, there exists a `B ÔŐć J` such that `N = sSup B`
- `h_final_left : ÔłÇ N Ôłł J, N Ôłł I` means `J ÔŐć I`

To show `I ÔŐć J`, let's take an arbitrary `N Ôłł I` and show `N Ôłł J`.

```tactics
import Mathlib.Algebra.DirectSum.Module
import PersistentDecomp.Mathlib.Order.Disjoint
import PersistentDecomp.Prereqs.Indecomposable
import PersistentDecomp.Prereqs.PersistenceSubmodule

/-!

# Direct sum decompositions for persistence modules (dual order version)

In this file, we define the type of direct sum decompositions of a persistence module `M`.
This has a natural order given by refinements.

Relation to the material in `PersistentDecomp.DirectSumDecompositionDual.lean`:
here, we are considering the *dual order* of the one constructed in the other file.

-/

open CategoryTheory CategoryTheory.Limits DirectSum
open CompleteLattice hiding sSup_le -- TODO: Fix in mathlib

namespace Dual

variable {C : Type} [Category.{0, 0} C] {K : Type} [DivisionRing K] {M : C ÔąĄ ModuleCat K}

variable (M) in
/-- A direct sum decomposition of `M ` is a set of non-zero submodules
that are linearly independent and whose supremum is the whole of `M`. -/
@[ext]
structure DirectSumDecomposition where
  carrier : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)
  sSupIndep' : sSupIndep carrier
  sSup_eq_top' : sSup carrier = ÔŐĄ
  not_bot_mem' : ÔŐą Ôłë carrier

namespace DirectSumDecomposition

instance : SetLike (DirectSumDecomposition M) (PersistenceSubmodule M) where
  coe := carrier
  coe_injective' DÔéü DÔéé := by cases DÔéü; congr!

attribute [-instance] SetLike.instPartialOrder

protected lemma sSupIndep (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) : sSupIndep (SetLike.coe D) := D.sSupIndep'

lemma sSup_eq_top (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) : sSup (SetLike.coe D) = ÔŐĄ := D.sSup_eq_top'
lemma not_bot_mem (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) : ÔŐą Ôłë D := D.not_bot_mem'

lemma pointwise_iSup_eq_top (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) (x : C) : ÔĘć p Ôłł D, p x = ÔŐĄ := sorry

lemma pointwise_sSup_eq_top (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) (x : C) : ÔĘć p Ôłł D, p x = ÔŐĄ := sorry

open scoped Classical in
lemma isInternal (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (c : C) :
    IsInternal (M := M.obj c) (S := Submodule K (M.obj c)) fun p : I ÔćŽ p.val c := by
  rw [DirectSum.isInternal_submodule_iff_iSupIndep_and_iSup_eq_top]
  constructor
  ┬Ě sorry
  sorry
  --rw [ÔćÉ iSup_apply, ÔćÉ sSup_eq_iSup', I.sSup_eq_top]
  --rfl

variable {M : C ÔąĄ ModuleCat K} in
/-- Let `DÔéü, DÔéé` be direct sum decompositions of `M` we say that `DÔéü` is a refinement of `DÔéé` if for
every submodule `N` that appears in `DÔéé`, there is a subset `B` of submodules that appear
in `DÔéü` such that `ÔłĹ T Ôłł B, T = N`. -/
def IsRefinement (DÔéü DÔéé : DirectSumDecomposition M) : Prop :=
  ÔłÇ ÔŽâNÔŽä, N Ôłł DÔéé Ôćĺ Ôłâ B : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M), B ÔŐć DÔéü Ôłž N = sSup B

variable {M : C ÔąĄ ModuleCat K} in
/-- Suppose `I, J` are direct sum decompositions of `M` and `J` is a refinement of `I`.
Then for any submodule `N` appearing in `J`, there is a submodule  `A` appearing in `I`
such that `N ÔëĄ A`. -/
lemma RefinementMapSurj' (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
  (h : IsRefinement J I) : ÔłÇ N : J, Ôłâ A : I, N.val ÔëĄ A.val := by
  by_contra! h_contra
  rcases h_contra with ÔčĘNÔéÇ, h_not_leÔčę
  have h_ge : NÔéÇ.val ÔŐö sSup I ÔëĄ sSup J := by
    rw [ÔćÉ sSup_pair]
    apply sSup_le_iff.mpr
    intro b h_mem
    rcases h_mem with ÔčĘh_nÔčę
    ┬Ě exact (le_sSup (h_n ÔľŞ NÔéÇ.prop))
    ┬Ě rename b Ôłł {sSup (SetLike.coe I)} => h_i
      have h' : sSup (SetLike.coe I) ÔëĄ sSup J := by
        rw [I.sSup_eq_top, J.sSup_eq_top]
      simp only [Set.mem_singleton_iff] at h_i
      exact (h_i ÔľŞ h')
  let B : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M) := {C | Ôłâ A : I, C ÔëĄ A.val Ôłž C Ôłł J}
  have h_sub : B ÔŐć J := by
    intro C h_C_mem
    simp only [exists_and_right, Subtype.exists, exists_prop, Set.mem_setOf_eq, B] at h_C_mem
    exact h_C_mem.right
  have h_aux : sSup B = sSup I := by
    simp_rw [le_antisymm_iff, sSup_le_iff]
    constructor
    ┬Ě intro b h_mem
      simp only [exists_and_right, Subtype.exists, exists_prop, Set.mem_setOf_eq, B] at h_mem
      rcases h_mem with ÔčĘhÔéü, _Ôčę
      rcases hÔéü with ÔčĘa, h_a, h_leÔčę
      exact le_sSup_of_le h_a h_le
    have h_le_subset : ÔłÇ A : I, Ôłâ C ÔŐć B, A ÔëĄ sSup C := by
      intro A
      choose f hf hf' using h
      refine ÔčĘf A.prop, ?_, by rw [ÔćÉ hf' A.prop]Ôčę
      intro ╬▒ h_╬▒
      simp only [exists_and_right, Subtype.exists, exists_prop, Set.mem_setOf_eq, B]
      refine ÔčĘÔčĘA, A.prop, ?_Ôčę, hf A.prop h_╬▒Ôčę
      rw [hf' A.prop]
      exact le_sSup h_╬▒
    intro A h_A_mem
    rcases h_le_subset ÔčĘA, h_A_memÔčę with ÔčĘC, h_CÔčę
    simp only at h_C
    exact le_trans h_C.right (sSup_le_sSup h_C.left)
  have h_aux' : NÔéÇ.val Ôłë B := by
    intro h_contra
    simp only [exists_and_right, Subtype.exists, exists_prop, Set.mem_setOf_eq, SetLike.coe_mem,
      and_true, B] at h_contra
    rcases h_contra with ÔčĘA, hÔéü, hÔééÔčę
    exact (h_not_le (ÔčĘA, hÔéüÔčę) hÔéé)
  have h_disj : Disjoint NÔéÇ.val (sSup B) := by
    exact (sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup J.sSupIndep' NÔéÇ.prop h_sub h_aux')
  have h_not_bot : NÔéÇ.val Ôëá ÔŐą := by
    intro h_contra
    exact J.not_bot_mem (h_contra ÔľŞ NÔéÇ.prop)
  have h_gt : sSup I < NÔéÇ.val ÔŐö sSup I := by
    rw [ÔćÉ h_aux]
    -- No clue why I couldn't use this theorem from mathlib directly and had to copy paste it here
    -- instead assuming it has to do with needing to bump
    exact (right_lt_sup_of_left_ne_bot h_disj h_not_bot)
  have contra : (ÔŐĄ : PersistenceSubmodule M) < ÔŐĄ := by
    rw [I.sSup_eq_top, J.sSup_eq_top] at *
    apply lt_of_lt_of_le h_gt h_ge
  exact (lt_self_iff_false (ÔŐĄ : PersistenceSubmodule M)).mp contra

/-- Suppose that `I, J` are direct sum decompositions of `M`, `N` is a submodule appearing in `J`
and `A, B` are submodules appearing in `I` such that `N ÔëĄ A, B`. Then `A = B`. -/
lemma UniqueGE (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
  (N : J) (A : I) (B : I) : N.val ÔëĄ A Ôłž N.val ÔëĄ B Ôćĺ A = B := by
  by_contra h'
  push_neg at h'
  rcases h' with ÔčĘh_le, h_neqÔčę
  have h_neq' : A.val Ôëá B.val := by
    simp [h_neq]
  have h_disj : Disjoint A.val B.val := by
    let s : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M) := {A.val, B.val}
    have h_sub : s ÔëĄ I.carrier := by
      intro X hx
      rcases hx with ÔčĘh_memÔčę
      ┬Ě exact (h_mem ÔľŞ A.prop)
      subst X
      exact B.prop
    exact (sSupIndep_pair h_neq').mp (sSupIndep.mono I.sSupIndep' h_sub)
  have h_le' : N.val ÔëĄ A.val ÔŐô B.val := le_inf h_le.1 h_le.2
  have h_eq_bot : N ÔëĄ (ÔŐą : PersistenceSubmodule M) := h_le'.trans <| disjoint_iff_inf_le.mp h_disj
  simp only [le_bot_iff] at h_eq_bot
  exact (J.not_bot_mem' (h_eq_bot ÔľŞ N.prop))

/-- Let `I, J` be direct sum decompositions of `M` with `J` a refinement of `I`.
Then `RefinementMap` is the function that sends a submodule `N` appearing in `J` to the unique submodule
in `I` that contains `N`. -/
noncomputable def RefinementMap (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
  (h : IsRefinement J I) : J Ôćĺ I :=
  open scoped Classical in
  if h' : I = J then by
    intro N
    use N
    exact (h' ÔľŞ N.prop)
  else by
    intro N
    choose A h using (RefinementMapSurj' I J h N)
    exact A

@[simp]
lemma RefinementMapId (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (h : IsRefinement I I) (N : I) :
  (RefinementMap I I h) N = N := by
  simp [RefinementMap]

/-- `RefinementMap N` sends `N` to something it is included in. -/
lemma RefinementMapLE (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
  (h : IsRefinement J I) : ÔłÇ N : J, N.val ÔëĄ (RefinementMap I J h N).val := by
  classical
  obtain rfl | hIJ := eq_or_ne I J
  ┬Ě simp [RefinementMapId]
  ┬Ě intro N
    simpa [RefinementMap, hIJ] using Exists.choose_spec (RefinementMapSurj' I J h N)

/-- Two modules that both decompose the same element are sent to the same submodule by the
`RefinementMap`. -/
lemma RefinementMapSameImage (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
    (h : IsRefinement J I) (NÔéü NÔéé : J) (h_leÔéü : NÔéé.val ÔëĄ RefinementMap I J h NÔéü) :
    RefinementMap I J h NÔéé = RefinementMap I J h NÔéü := by
  have h_leÔéé : NÔéé.val ÔëĄ (RefinementMap I J h NÔéé) := RefinementMapLE I J h NÔéé
  exact (UniqueGE I J NÔéé (RefinementMap I J h NÔéü) (RefinementMap I J h NÔéé) (ÔčĘh_leÔéü, h_leÔééÔčę)).symm

/-- If `N ÔëĄ A` for some `A : I`, then `RefinementMap N = A`. -/
lemma SendsToUniqueGE (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
    (h : IsRefinement J I) (N : J) (A : I) : N.val ÔëĄ A Ôćĺ (RefinementMap I J h N) = A := by
  intro h_le
  let B : I := (RefinementMap I J h N)
  rw [UniqueGE I J N A B (ÔčĘh_le, RefinementMapLE I J h NÔčę)]

lemma RefinmentMapFunctorial (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
    (K : DirectSumDecomposition M) (hij : IsRefinement J I) (hjk : IsRefinement K J)
    (hik : IsRefinement K I) (N : K) :
    RefinementMap I K hik N = RefinementMap I J hij (RefinementMap J K hjk N) := by
  have h_le : N.val ÔëĄ RefinementMap I J hij (RefinementMap J K hjk N) := by
    apply le_trans (RefinementMapLE J K hjk N)
    exact (RefinementMapLE I J hij _)
  exact SendsToUniqueGE I K hik N (RefinementMap I J hij (RefinementMap J K hjk N)) h_le

/-- The refinement relation defines a preorder on direct sum decompositions of `M` via `DÔéü ÔëĄ DÔéé` if
and only if `DÔéü` is a refinement of `DÔéé` i.e. this relation is reflexive and transitive. -/
instance : Preorder (DirectSumDecomposition M) where
  le DÔéü DÔéé := IsRefinement DÔéü DÔéé
  --DÔéü ÔëĄ DÔéé iff DÔéü refines DÔéé.
  le_refl D := by intro N _; use {N}; aesop
  le_trans IÔéü IÔéé IÔéâ h12 h23 := by
    intro N h_mem
    rcases (h23 h_mem) with ÔčĘC, h_sub, h_eqÔčę
    choose f hf hf' using h12
    let A := ÔĘć (c : C), (f (h_sub c.prop))
    use A
    constructor
    ┬Ě apply iSup_le_iff.mpr
      intro c
      exact hf (h_sub c.prop)
    ┬Ě have h_aux' : sSup A = sSup C := by
        simp_rw [le_antisymm_iff, sSup_le_iff]
        constructor
        ┬Ě intro a h_a
          have h_aux'' : Ôłâ (c : C), a Ôłł (f (h_sub c.prop)) := by aesop
          rcases h_aux'' with ÔčĘc_a, h_caÔčę
          have h_le : a ÔëĄ c_a := by rw [hf' (h_sub c_a.2)]; apply le_sSup h_ca
          apply le_sSup_of_le c_a.prop h_le
        intro c h_mem_c
        let c' : C := ÔčĘc, h_mem_cÔčę
        have h_le_c : c ÔëĄ sSup (f (h_sub c'.prop)) := by
          rw [ÔćÉ hf' (h_sub c'.prop)]
        apply le_trans h_le_c
        apply sSup_le
        intro a h_mem_a
        have h_a_in_A : a Ôłł A := by
          have h_subs : f (h_sub c'.prop) ÔëĄ A := by
            apply le_iSup_of_le c'
            exact le_rfl
          exact h_subs h_mem_a
        exact le_sSup h_a_in_A
      rwa [h_aux']

/-- The refinement relation is antisymmetric. This (combined with the above)
means that it defines a partial order on direct sum decompositions. -/
instance DirectSumDecompLE : PartialOrder (DirectSumDecomposition M) where
  le_antisymm := by
    intro I J h_J_le_I h_I_le_J
    have h_final_left : ÔłÇ N Ôłł J, N Ôłł I := by
      intro N
      by_contra h_neg
      push_neg at h_neg

intro N hN
      have hN_in_I : N Ôłł I := hN
      have hN_in_J : N Ôłł J := by
        have h1 : IsRefinement J I := h_J_le_I
        have h2 : N Ôłł I := hN_in_I
        rcases h1 N h2 with ÔčĘB, hB_sub_J, hN_eq_sSup_BÔčę
        have h3 : sSup B Ôłł J := by
          apply J.sSup_mem
          intro b hb
          have hb_in_B : b Ôłł B := hb
          have hb_in_J : b Ôłł J := hB_sub_J hb_in_B
          exact hb_in_J
        have h4 : N = sSup B := hN_eq_sSup_B
        rw [h4]
        exact h3
      exact hN_in_J
    ext N
    simp [h_final_left, h_final_right]

ementMap N` sends `N` to something it is included in. -/
lemma RefinementMapLE (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
  (h : IsRefinement J I) : ÔłÇ N : J, N.val ÔëĄ (RefinementMap I J h N).val := by
  classical
  obtain rfl | hIJ := eq_or_ne I J
  ┬Ě simp [RefinementMapId]
  ┬Ě intro N
    simpa [RefinementMap, hIJ] using Exists.choose_spec (RefinementMapSurj' I J h N)

/-- Two modules that both decompose the same element are sent to the same submodule by the
`RefinementMap`. -/
lemma RefinementMapSameImage (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
    (h : IsRefinement J I) (NÔéü NÔéé : J) (h_leÔéü : NÔéé.val ÔëĄ RefinementMap I J h NÔéü) :
    RefinementMap I J h NÔéé = RefinementMap I J h NÔéü := by
  have h_leÔéé : NÔéé.val ÔëĄ (RefinementMap I J h NÔéé) := RefinementMapLE I J h NÔéé
  exact (UniqueGE I J NÔéé (RefinementMap I J h NÔéü) (RefinementMap I J h NÔéé) (ÔčĘh_leÔéü, h_leÔééÔčę)).symm

/-- If `N ÔëĄ A` for some `A : I`, then `RefinementMap N = A`. -/
lemma SendsToUniqueGE (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
    (h : IsRefinement J I) (N : J) (A : I) : N.val ÔëĄ A Ôćĺ (RefinementMap I J h N) = A := by
  intro h_le
  let B : I := (RefinementMap I J h N)
  rw [UniqueGE I J N A B (ÔčĘh_le, RefinementMapLE I J h NÔčę)]

lemma RefinmentMapFunctorial (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
    (K : DirectSumDecomposition M) (hij : IsRefinement J I) (hjk : IsRefinement K J)
    (hik : IsRefinement K I) (N : K) :
    RefinementMap I K hik N = RefinementMap I J hij (RefinementMap J K hjk N) := by
  have h_le : N.val ÔëĄ RefinementMap I J hij (RefinementMap J K hjk N) := by
    apply le_trans (RefinementMapLE J K hjk N)
    exact (RefinementMapLE I J hij _)
  exact SendsToUniqueGE I K hik N (RefinementMap I J hij (RefinementMap J K hjk N)) h_le

/-- The refinement relation defines a preorder on direct sum decompositions of `M` via `DÔéü ÔëĄ DÔéé` if
and only if `DÔéü` is a refinement of `DÔéé` i.e. this relation is reflexive and transitive. -/
instance : Preorder (DirectSumDecomposition M) where
  le DÔéü DÔéé := IsRefinement DÔéü DÔéé
  --DÔéü ÔëĄ DÔéé iff DÔéü refines DÔéé.
  le_refl D := by intro N _; use {N}; aesop
  le_trans IÔéü IÔéé IÔéâ h12 h23 := by
    intro N h_mem
    rcases (h23 h_mem) with ÔčĘC, h_sub, h_eqÔčę
    choose f hf hf' using h12
    let A := ÔĘć (c : C), (f (h_sub c.prop))
    use A
    constructor
    ┬Ě apply iSup_le_iff.mpr
      intro c
      exact hf (h_sub c.prop)
    ┬Ě have h_aux' : sSup A = sSup C := by
        simp_rw [le_antisymm_iff, sSup_le_iff]
        constructor
        ┬Ě intro a h_a
          have h_aux'' : Ôłâ (c : C), a Ôłł (f (h_sub c.prop)) := by aesop
          rcases h_aux'' with ÔčĘc_a, h_caÔčę
          have h_le : a ÔëĄ c_a := by rw [hf' (N := c_a) (h_sub c_a.2)]; apply le_sSup h_ca
          apply le_sSup_of_le c_a.prop h_le
        intro c h_mem_c
        let c' : C := ÔčĘc, h_mem_cÔčę
        have h_le_c : c ÔëĄ sSup (f (h_sub c'.prop)) := by
          rw [ÔćÉ hf' (h_sub c'.prop)]
        apply le_trans h_le_c
        apply sSup_le
        intro a h_mem_a
        have h_a_in_A : a Ôłł A := by
          have h_subs : f (h_sub c'.prop) ÔëĄ A := by
            apply le_iSup_of_le c'
            exact le_rfl
          exact h_subs h_mem_a
        exact le_sSup h_a_in_A
      rwa [h_aux']

/-- The refinement relation is antisymmetric. This (combined with the above)
means that it defines a partial order on direct sum decompositions. -/
instance DirectSumDecompLE : PartialOrder (DirectSumDecomposition M) where
  le_antisymm := by
    intro I J h_J_le_I h_I_le_J
    have h_final_left : ÔłÇ N Ôłł J, N Ôłł I := by
      intro N
      by_contra h_neg
      push_neg at h_neg
      rcases h_neg with ÔčĘh_N_in_J, h_N_not_in_IÔčę
      let N' : J := ÔčĘN, h_N_in_JÔčę
      have h_A : Ôłâ A : I, N ÔëĄ A.val := by
        exact (RefinementMapSurj' I J h_I_le_J) N'
      rcases h_A with ÔčĘA, h_N_le_AÔčę
      choose f hf hf' using h_J_le_I
      let h_BÔéü := hf' N'.prop
      let h_BÔéé := hf N'.prop
      simp only at h_BÔéü
      have h_mem : A.val Ôłł f N'.prop := by
        by_contra h_A_not_mem
```
